plan.title: Redesign PRISM refresh/runtime so request paths never block on full persisted rebuilds, the live runtime is authoritative for serving reads and applying mutations, snapshots/cache become optional startup or recovery aids only, and repo-committed memories, concepts, and plans remain the only durable truth that must survive storage resets.
plan.goal: Redesign PRISM refresh/runtime so request paths never block on full persisted rebuilds, the live runtime is authoritative for serving reads and applying mutations, snapshots/cache become optional startup or recovery aids only, and repo-committed memories, concepts, and plans remain the only durable truth that must survive storage resets.

plan.title: Redesign PRISM refresh/runtime so request paths never block on full persisted rebuilds, the live runtime is authoritative for serving reads and applying mutations, snapshots/cache become optional startup or recovery aids only, and repo-committed memories, concepts, and plans remain the only durable truth that must survive storage resets.
plan.goal: Redesign PRISM refresh/runtime so request paths never block on full persisted rebuilds, the live runtime is authoritative for serving reads and applying mutations, snapshots/cache become optional startup or recovery aids only, and repo-committed memories, concepts, and plans remain the only durable truth that must survive storage resets.

node.title: Define refresh-runtime invariants and explicit delete list

acceptance.label: Deprecated mechanisms and compatibility paths are explicitly listed for removal
Request paths are forbidden from full persisted rebuilds
Serving authority is defined as live runtime state, not snapshot reloads

node.title: Cut synchronous request-path refresh from read surfaces

acceptance.label: Background refresh is the only owner of heavy refresh work
Compact, query, and resource reads do not call full persisted sync on the request path
Read freshness is observed and surfaced without blocking reload

node.title: Make mutations patch live runtime first and isolate admin-only rebuild flows

acceptance.label: Normal mutations update live runtime directly and persist without pre-refresh
Snapshot reload or repair becomes explicit admin behavior only
Validation feedback, memory, concept, plan, and coordination writes avoid request-path rebuilds

node.title: Demote snapshots and cache to optional startup or recovery aids

acceptance.label: Cold hydrate and explicit recovery paths are separated from steady-state serving
Live serving works with snapshots disabled
Storage reset or schema break does not endanger repo-committed memories, concepts, or plans

node.title: Instrument freshness and materialization state and validate latency behavior

acceptance.label: Compact and query latency reflects handler cost instead of hidden synchronous rebuild cost
Logs can distinguish stale, deferred, shallow, deep, and recovery states
Refresh phases expose lock wait, revision check, delta application, and reload timing explicitly
